talk_title: KRAS-targeted therapy Phase III trial results in pancreatic cancer

speaker.name: Julie Fleshman
speaker.affiliation: President and CEO, Pancreatic Cancer Action Network (PanCAN)

models.name: Phase III KRAS inhibitor trial (Revolution Medicines)

MOA_summary: A KRAS-directed small‑molecule inhibitor was evaluated in a Phase III trial for pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma, demonstrating a favorable safety profile and evidence of clinical activity that supports KRAS as a therapeutic target in this disease.
key_findings: Revolution Medicines reported positive Phase III trial results for a KRAS‑targeted therapy in pancreatic cancer.
The trial represents a major step forward for KRAS‑directed treatment strategies in pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma.
